contract.payment_cadence: By Ordering Period (annual); specific CLINs marked NTE suggest task-order-level invoicing for NRE
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 150 units @ $18,000 (Period 1) + 150 @ $18,630 (Period 2) + 125 @ $19,282 (Period 3) + 125 @ $19,957 (Period 4) + 125 @ $20,655 (Period 5)

Mission Days Operational support (30 days @ $2,850 × 5 periods) + Operational and Testing Support (6 days @ $6,000 × 5 periods) + Training Sessions (Operator/Observer @ $6,000 + Instructor @ $600 × 5 periods)
Course Development: Operator and Observer Course + Instructor Training Course ($6,000 each × 5 periods)
Travel for Operational Support NTE $50,000 per Ordering Period × 5 periods
Non-recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation, Modeling, and NHC workflow integration (3 CLINs × $66,000 NTE × 5 periods)
